colors.name: paper
colors.role: ground — warm cream paper, the webtoon background panel; every section is drawn on it

colors.name: paper-warm
colors.role: aged paper — caption scrolls, panel borders, hover washes (15.0:1 on ink)

colors.name: ink
colors.role: warm brown ink — all functional text, the wordmark, panel frames (12.0:1 on paper, AAA)

colors.name: ink-soft
colors.role: ink thinned with milk — secondary text, captions, hours (6.6:1 on paper, AA)

colors.name: apricot
colors.role: the warm accent — dawn light, the ! in PPANG!, focus ring, selection; 3.0:1 on paper so display/decorative only; as a surface it carries ink at 4.9:1

colors.name: amber-deep
colors.role: banked apricot — wherever the accent must function on paper: eyebrows, the dawn numerals, focus, selection ground (4.8:1 on paper, AA)

colors.name: dawn-indigo
colors.role: pre-dawn sky at the top of the scroll — decorative backdrop only, never text (carries paper at 9.4:1)

colors.name: dawn-blush
colors.role: the pink middle of the dawn sky — decorative only

colors.name: crust
colors.role: baked-bread brown — the loaf tone, SFX fills; 3.4:1 on paper, decorative/large only

fonts.role: Korean display — the wordmark 빵!, panel titles, SFX lettering; loud, warm, webtoon-cover voice
every Korean body glyph — captions, narration, hours; a warm serif so the story reads like a letter, not a menu
English voice — the wordmark subtitle, English captions, the sign; optical-sized serif with a baked-in warmth

texture: Three static paper layers, none animated (the paper is a page, not a screen). (1) Fibers: one fixed full-viewport SVG feTurbulence (fractalNoise, baseFrequency 0.6, 2 octaves, seed 7, stitchTiles) mapped by feColorMatrix to ink at ~6% alpha, mix-blend-mode: multiply, opacity 0.6 — warm cream fibers. (2) Warmth: a faint radial amber vignette transparent → rgba(232,155,76,0.05) at the edges. (3) Laid lines: repeating-linear-gradient, 1.5px of rgba(61,40,23,0.015) every 6px. Over the illustrations, soft drop-shadows (0 18px 40px rgba(61,40,23,0.12)) and a 6px paper mount give every panel the look of a drawing glued to the page.

motion.name: ease-page
motion.value: cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1) — every entrance; a page turned and settling

motion.name: ease-pan
motion.value: cubic-bezier(0.33, 1, 0.68, 1) — camera pans, gentler than the page turn

motion.name: panel-reveal
motion.value: clip-path inset(0 100% 0 0) → inset(0), 1100ms ease-page, +120ms translateY(28px) settle — a panel wiped open like a new webtoon cut

motion.name: caption-in
motion.value: opacity 0→1 + translateY(12px), 800ms ease-page, firing 350ms after its panel is visible

motion.name: glyph-cadence
motion.value: 850ms ease-page; 38ms/glyph stagger for split captions — like a narrator reading aloud

motion.name: parallax-depth
motion.value: hero layers translate by scroll progress × {sky 0.10, far 0.16, bakery 0.26, sign 0.34} vh — capped, transform-only; far layers drift slower

motion.name: dawn-scrub
motion.value: --ppang-dawn ∈ [0,1] driven by scroll progress 0→0.55 of the page; three stacked sky gradients (indigo / blush / gold) crossfade by opacity via calc()+clamp()+max()/min() — no per-frame gradient-stop animation, transform/opacity-safe

motion.name: hero-float
motion.value: the bakery sign sways ±1.1deg over 6.2s; the steam rises 1.0 over 5.3s — mutually prime, opacity/transform only

motion.name: reveal
motion.value: 950ms ease-page, translateY(20px) → 0, 90ms batch stagger — section heads, the menu, the footer
